news.title:
Kirloskar Oil Engines Ltd forms Kirloskar Advanced Systems Pvt Ltd in Pune on 30 Mar 2026.
Subsidiary focuses on defence, railways; initial investment of ₹9 crore via 90 lakh equity shares.
news.summary:
Kirloskar Oil Engines Ltd forms Kirloskar Advanced Systems Pvt Ltd in Pune on 30 Mar 2026.
Subsidiary focuses on defence, railways; initial investment of ₹9 crore via 90 lakh equity shares.

news.title:
Kirloskar Oil Engines' GST tax demand cut to ₹1.25 Cr for FY21.
Interest demand reduced to ₹1.09 Cr; ₹25.13 Cr penalty remains unchanged.
news.summary:
Kirloskar Oil Engines' GST tax demand cut to ₹1.25 Cr for FY21.
Interest demand reduced to ₹1.09 Cr; ₹25.13 Cr penalty remains unchanged.

news.title:
Kirloskar Oil Engines rescheduled investor meetings to 13th March 2026.
Sessions include group, one-on-one with institutions like Philip Capital and Goldman Sachs.
news.summary:
Kirloskar Oil Engines rescheduled investor meetings to 13th March 2026.
Sessions include group, one-on-one with institutions like Philip Capital and Goldman Sachs.

news.title:
Kirloskar Oil Engines Ltd chairman Atul Kirloskar steps down.
Rahul Kirloskar appointed as the new chairperson of the company.
news.summary:
Kirloskar Oil Engines Ltd chairman Atul Kirloskar steps down.
Rahul Kirloskar appointed as the new chairperson of the company.

news.title:
Kirloskar Oil Engines held a virtual analyst meeting on 4th March 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was shared during this interaction.
news.summary:
Kirloskar Oil Engines held a virtual analyst meeting on 4th March 2026.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was shared during this interaction.

news.title:
Kirloskar Oil's Dec 2025 net sales rose 28.8% Y-o-Y to Rs 1,872.6 crore.
Net profit surged 56.2% Y-o-Y to Rs 111.38 crore; EPS increased to Rs 7.66.
news.summary:
Kirloskar Oil's Dec 2025 net sales rose 28.8% Y-o-Y to Rs 1,872.6 crore.
Net profit surged 56.2% Y-o-Y to Rs 111.38 crore; EPS increased to Rs 7.66.

news.title:
Kirloskar Oil Engines held a conference call on Feb 12, 2026, discussing unaudited Q3 and 9-month results.
Audio recording of the call is accessible on www.kirloskaroilengines.com for investor reference.
news.summary:
Kirloskar Oil Engines held a conference call on Feb 12, 2026, discussing unaudited Q3 and 9-month results.
Audio recording of the call is accessible on www.kirloskaroilengines.com for investor reference.

news.title:
Kirloskar Oil Engines approves AED 3.2M (INR 8 Cr) investment in UAE subsidiary.
Investment supports working capital, acquisition, and expansion in Africa & Middle East.
news.summary:
Kirloskar Oil Engines approves AED 3.2M (INR 8 Cr) investment in UAE subsidiary.
Investment supports working capital, acquisition, and expansion in Africa & Middle East.

news.title:
Kirloskar Oil Engines Ltd's board approves wholly-owned subsidiary, Kirloskar Advanced Systems Pvt Ltd.
The subsidiary, registered in Pune, will focus on defence, railways, and industrial equipment with an initial ₹9 cr investment.
news.summary:
Kirloskar Oil Engines Ltd's board approves wholly-owned subsidiary, Kirloskar Advanced Systems Pvt Ltd.
The subsidiary, registered in Pune, will focus on defence, railways, and industrial equipment with an initial ₹9 cr investment.

news.title:
Kirloskar Oil Engines posts Rs. 138.5 crore standalone Q3 FY25 profit; declares Rs. 2.5/share interim dividend for FY26.
B2C segment transferred via slump sale; 9,074 shares allotted under ESOP, increasing paid-up capital.
news.summary:
Kirloskar Oil Engines posts Rs. 138.5 crore standalone Q3 FY25 profit; declares Rs. 2.5/share interim dividend for FY26.
B2C segment transferred via slump sale; 9,074 shares allotted under ESOP, increasing paid-up capital.

news.title:
Kirloskar Oil Engines Ltd saw an NSE block trade of ~320,472 shares at Rs. 1,237.5.
The total value of the block trade amounted to Rs. 39.7 crores.
news.summary:
Kirloskar Oil Engines Ltd saw an NSE block trade of ~320,472 shares at Rs. 1,237.5.
The total value of the block trade amounted to Rs. 39.7 crores.

news.title:
Kirloskar Oil Engines received a favorable GST order for FY21-22 ITC mismatch.
Penalty reduced to ₹2.5M, interest to ₹19.6M, and tax to ₹23.9M; appeal ongoing.
news.summary:
Kirloskar Oil Engines received a favorable GST order for FY21-22 ITC mismatch.
Penalty reduced to ₹2.5M, interest to ₹19.6M, and tax to ₹23.9M; appeal ongoing.

news.title:
Kirloskar Oil Engines announces investor/analyst meetings scheduled for 10th Dec 2025.
Meetings include 1x1 sessions with Avendus, New Vernon, and a group virtual meeting.
news.summary:
Kirloskar Oil Engines announces investor/analyst meetings scheduled for 10th Dec 2025.
Meetings include 1x1 sessions with Avendus, New Vernon, and a group virtual meeting.

news.title:
Kirloskar Oil Engines Ltd reported strong Q2 FY26 performance with net sales surpassing INR 1,500 crore for the first time, reflecting 35% YoY growth.
EBITDA margin stood at 13.4%, driven by robust growth across segments like Power Generation, Industrial, and B2C, with exports contributing significantly.
news.summary:
Kirloskar Oil Engines Ltd reported strong Q2 FY26 performance with net sales surpassing INR 1,500 crore for the first time, reflecting 35% YoY growth.
EBITDA margin stood at 13.4%, driven by robust growth across segments like Power Generation, Industrial, and B2C, with exports contributing significantly.

news.title:
Kirloskar Oil Engines held investor meetings during UBS India Summit 2025.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was discussed in the meetings.
news.summary:
Kirloskar Oil Engines held investor meetings during UBS India Summit 2025.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was discussed in the meetings.

news.title:
Kirloskar Oil Engines sees rally in trade alongside Yatra Online and IOL Chemical.
Pharma and AWFIS Space Solutions also witness upward movement in the market.
news.summary:
Kirloskar Oil Engines sees rally in trade alongside Yatra Online and IOL Chemical.
Pharma and AWFIS Space Solutions also witness upward movement in the market.

news.title:
Kirloskar Oil Engines reports Q2 FY26 net sales at ₹1,500 Cr, up 35% YoY.
Q2 FY26 net profit rises 44% YoY to ₹141 Cr; B2C restructuring planned for growth.
news.summary:
Kirloskar Oil Engines reports Q2 FY26 net sales at ₹1,500 Cr, up 35% YoY.
Q2 FY26 net profit rises 44% YoY to ₹141 Cr; B2C restructuring planned for growth.
